# 部署csb系统【非必需】

## 新建csb项目


#### 克隆地址：


[git@gitlab.gz.cvte.cn](mailto:git@gitlab.gz.cvte.cn):it-frontend/csb.git


#### 安装依赖：


```
yarn
```


#### 参考阿波罗配置：


```
cirapi.snm = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
cirapi.dictionary = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
cirapi.antdframe = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
cirapi.menumanager = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
cirapi.organization = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
cirapi.rolemanager = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
cirapi.usermanager = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
api.baseUrl = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
port = 65001
auth.url = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
auth.cipherKey = 4PXP3HfgJtWuiJFu
auth.multiOrg = true
cirapi.anm = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
cirapi.posiManager = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
cirapi.viewManager = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
cirapi.workflow = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
cirapi.interfaceManager = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox/admin/v1
redis.host = redis001.gz.cvte.cn
redis.port = 6379
redis.password = Pass4redisserver
redis.database = 21
redis.prefix = csb
loginWith4A = true
loginWithOp = true
op.host = https://op.cvte.com
op.appId = aec899b37e70430fa0fbaeba7beaebf6
domain = https://csb.gz.cvte.cn
apmConfig.need = false
apmConfig.serviceName = csb
apmConfig.environment = prod
object.url = https://subback.test.seewo.com
apmConfig.serverUrl = https://esapm.cvte.com
lcp.annex = https://csb-api.gz.cvte.cn/cfile
lcp.hub = https://lcp.gz.cvte.cn/hub
lcp.core = https://lcp.gz.cvte.cn/app
lcphub.url = https://lcp.gz.cvte.cn/hub
change.data.indexName = lcp-substance-change
item.data.indexName = lcp-substance-item
lcp.faas = https://csb-gw.gz.cvte.cn/api
zipkinUrl = https://itrace.gz.cvte.cn
kibanaUrl = http://kibana.test.seewo.com
lcp.gw = https://csb-gw.gz.cvte.cn
lcp.app = https://lcp.gz.cvte.cn/app
api.csbBase = https://csb-admin.gz.cvte.cn/legox

```


#### 本地启动进行验证：


```
// 启动node
yarn dev

// 启动前端
yarn hot
```


启动成功后，访问[http://localhost:3001端口进行验证](http://localhost:3001端口进行验证)


#### 鲸云构建命令参考：


```
rm -rf sample-app.tar
# npm config set registry https://registry.npm.taobao.org
npm config set @cvte:registry https://artifactory.gz.cvte.cn/artifactory/api/npm/cvte-npm-registry/
# git submodule init
# git pull --recurse-submodules
# git submodule update --init --recursive
yarn
APOLLO_APP_ID=S75PqGyA APOLLO_NAME_SPACES=dept1.sign,frontconf bash build.bash prod production
tar -cf sample-app.tar *
echo "print file list ..."
ls -al
```
